definition_summary: Invests in money market instruments complying with MMFR Short Term Money Market definition. CNAV/LVNAV/VNAV structures permitted.
Invests in money market instruments complying with MMFR Standard Money Market definition. Variable NAV structure.
At least 95% in Sterling or hedged-to-Sterling government securities. At least 80% in UK conventional Gilts rated same or higher than UK sovereign.
At least 95% in Sterling or hedged-to-Sterling government index-linked securities. At least 80% in UK Index Linked Gilts.
At least 80% in Sterling or hedged-to-Sterling BBB- or above corporate bonds. Supranational and government-backed debt counts toward core.
At least 80% in Sterling or hedged-to-Sterling fixed interest. Manager retains right to invest across full Sterling credit risk spectrum at any time.
At least 80% in Sterling or hedged-to-Sterling below BBB- fixed interest securities.
At least 80% in USD government bonds issued or explicitly guaranteed by the US government.
At least 80% in EUR government bonds issued or explicitly guaranteed by European governments.
At least 80% in a diversified portfolio of government-backed securities from around the world in a variety of currencies.
At least 80% in a diversified portfolio of inflation-linked bond securities from around the world in a variety of issuers and currencies.
At least 80% in USD-denominated BBB- or above corporate bond securities. Supranational and government-backed debt counts toward core.
At least 80% in EUR-denominated BBB- or above corporate bond securities. Supranational and government-backed debt counts toward core.
At least 80% in a diversified portfolio of BBB- or above corporate bonds from around the world in a variety of currencies.
At least 80% in USD bond securities. Manager retains right to invest across full USD bond credit and type spectrum at any time.
At least 80% in EUR bond securities. Manager retains right to invest across full EUR bond credit and type spectrum at any time.
At least 80% in bond securities across credit type and currency spectrum globally. Manager retains flexibility across bond types and currencies.
At least 80% in USD-denominated below BBB- fixed income securities.
At least 80% in EUR-denominated below BBB- fixed income securities.
At least 80% in a diversified portfolio of below BBB- fixed income from around the world in a variety of issuers and currencies.

sector_name: Global Emerging Markets Bond - Hard Currency
definition_summary: At least 80% in emerging market bond issuers (sovereign or corporate) denominated in hard currency. Must be diversified without country or regional focus.

sector_name: Global Emerging Markets Bond - Local Currency
definition_summary: At least 80% in emerging market bond issuers (sovereign or corporate) denominated in local currencies. Must be diversified without country or regional focus.
At least 80% in emerging market bond issuers. May have hard or local currency bias at different times. Must be diversified without country or regional focus.
At least 80% in UK equities. Must yield in excess of 100% of FTSE All Share yield on 3-year rolling basis and 90% annually. Income is a primary objective.
At least 80% globally in equities diversified by region. Must yield in excess of 100% of MSCI World yield on 3-year rolling basis and 90% annually.
At least 80% in UK equities with primary objective of capital growth. No income requirement. Flexibility across market cap and style.
At least 80% in UK equities of companies forming the smallest 15% by market capitalisation. Universe constructed monthly by monitoring company.
At least 80% in Asia Pacific equities including Japanese content. Japanese content must be less than 80% of assets.
At least 80% in Asia Pacific equities. Japanese securities excluded. Up to 5% in Japanese equities permitted for corporate action flexibility only.
At least 80% directly or indirectly in equities of PRC, Hong Kong or Taiwan. May invest solely in China or diversified across Greater China.
At least 80% in European equities. May include UK equities but these must not exceed 80% of the fund.
At least 80% in European equities. UK securities excluded. Up to 5% in UK equities permitted for corporate action flexibility only.
At least 80% in European equities of companies forming the smallest 30% by market capitalisation. May include UK equities up to 80%.
At least 80% globally in equities. Must be diversified by geographic region. Includes thematic and style-biased global funds provided geographic diversification is maintained.
80% or more in equities from emerging market countries per FTSE or MSCI Emerging Markets and Frontier indices. Maximum 20% frontier equity exposure.
At least 80% in equities of India or the Indian subcontinent. May invest solely in India or diversified across the subcontinent.
At least 80% in Japanese equities.
At least 80% in Latin American equities as defined by recognised indices. Expected to be diversified; single country funds classified to Specialist.
At least 80% in North American equities. US-focused funds qualify; Canada-only funds classified to Specialist.
At least 80% in North American equities of companies forming the bottom 20% by market capitalisation.
Maximum 35% equity. Minimum 45% investment grade fixed income and cash. Designed for cautious investors seeking capital preservation with some growth.
keyridge_funds: WS Keyridge DRM III; WS Keyridge Portfolio III

definition_summary: Minimum 20% and maximum 60% equity. Minimum 30% fixed income and cash. Designed for balanced investors seeking growth and income.
keyridge_funds: WS Keyridge DRM IV; WS Keyridge Portfolio IV; WS Keyridge Diversified Monthly Income

definition_summary: Minimum 40% and maximum 85% equity. No minimum fixed income requirement. Designed for growth-oriented investors with higher equity tolerance.
keyridge_funds: WS Keyridge DRM V; WS Keyridge DRM VI; WS Keyridge Portfolio V; WS Keyridge Portfolio VI

definition_summary: No minimum or maximum equity requirement. Manager has significant discretion over asset allocation and may invest up to 100% in equities.
Funds whose objective is to manage returns within specified volatility parameters. A fund may form part of a suite across a risk spectrum. Asset selection at manager discretion.
keyridge_funds: WS Keyridge DRM III; WS Keyridge DRM IV; WS Keyridge DRM V; WS Keyridge DRM VI

definition_summary: Managed with the aim of delivering positive returns in any market conditions (not guaranteed). Must state timeframe not exceeding three years.
At least 80% in commodity or natural resources related equities. May be diversified across commodities or focused on specific industries.
At least 80% in equities of financial services companies including banking, insurance, capital markets, fintech and consumer finance in any country.
At least 80% in equities of healthcare companies including pharmaceuticals, equipment and services. Diversified across healthcare sectors.
At least 80% (directly or indirectly) in companies involved in ownership, operation or maintenance of infrastructure assets. Equities primary but debt and REITs may contribute.
At least 80% in equities of technology and related sectors including telecommunications, robotics and online retailers. Fintech excluded (see Financials sector).
Average at least 70% in UK direct property over 5-year rolling periods. Must be balanced (diversified by type and location). Specialist property funds go to Property Other.
Predominantly property but does not meet UK Direct Property requirements. Includes offshore property, property securities funds, and hybrid direct/securities funds.
At least 80% in bond securities not qualifying for any other IA bond sector. Includes convertibles, ABS specialists, short-duration strategies, and unrated bond-focused funds.
keyridge_funds: WS Keyridge Short Duration Corporate Bond; WS Keyridge Sterling Short Term Bond

definition_summary: Funds not classified into other IA sectors including private funds and funds removed from other sectors for non-compliance. IA collects static data only.
